title: Bundle Inventory
description:
Adds interactive UI to Bundle.
Completely client-sided!
body:
# Interactive inventory for Bundle
![Bundle Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f6273aac1a03b4fe009459f05a2528ef8314002.png)

## Features
- **Client-side only!**
- Allows to extract **any** item from Bundle
- Allows to insert items into Bundle via UI
- Allows to shift-click items from/into Bundle
- Allows to drop any item directly from Bundle
- Allows to open Bundle from any slot of player's inventory: **Shift + Right-click** to any Bundle
- UI automagically adapts to the selected resource packs

## Warning
- Use the mod on public servers only under your responsibility. Some anti-cheats may react badly to it (like with other client-side inventory tweaks mods).

## Future plans
- NeoForge support
